name: Strip Poker with the party {BG3}
description:
You and the party are playing strip poker at a tavern.

Halsin and Karlach are out, Shadowheart is down to her underwear, Gale, Wyll, and Lae'zel are only in their pants, and Astarion is winning.

I had to crop the picture a lot to post this, here's the original if you wanna see it ---> This
creator: The Lunar Moon
